description_long: This helicopter features a geometric, angular fuselage with a matte black finish, accented by a blue-tinted cockpit area and orange tail and landing skids. The main rotor consists of two long, flat black blades mounted centrally on the roof, while the tail boom extends rearward, ending in a vertical stabilizer with an orange tail rotor. The cockpit windows are large, rectangular, and blue, wrapping around the front and sides for wide visibility. The landing skids are simple, straight bars with orange footpads, providing stable ground support. The overall design is minimalistic and stylized, with clear, blocky shapes and no visible registration markings.
description: A stylized black helicopter with blue cockpit windows, orange tail, and simple landing skids, featuring two main rotor blades and a blocky, angular design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black fuselage, blue cockpit window, orange tail, and two main rotor blades.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide blue cockpit windows, black fuselage, and the full span of the main rotor.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the orange tail, black body, and blue cockpit window visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the orange tail rotor, black tail boom, and the back of the landing skids.
attribute_rotor_blades: Two long, flat, black main rotor blades with a simple rectangular shape and no visible markings, each spanning nearly the full width of the helicopter.
attribute_tail_rotor: A single orange tail rotor with two blades, mounted vertically at the end of the tail boom, with no visible protective structure.
attribute_landing_skids: Straight, black landing skids with orange footpads, connected by simple crossbars, providing a stable base for landing.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Two large, rectangular blue cockpit windows wrapping around the front and sides, with no visible framing or markings.
